use_cases: Displaying filter tags in SaaS dashboards for data filtering
Showing status badges or labels on cards and list items
Representing removable categories or topics in content management
Indicating selection states in multi-select interfaces
Adding metadata labels with icons to indicate content type or priority
ai_summary: A versatile chip/tag component with multiple visual variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline, ghost), three size options, and optional icon support. Features left/right icon positioning and dismissible functionality for interactive tag-based interfaces. Built with CVA for variant composition, this atomic component is commonly used in filtering systems, status indicators, and categorization UI patterns across SaaS and content management applications.
